title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Radiologist to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions:
Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals Ventures Solutions!
